# Vendored llm-anonymization-v2

Self-contained copy of the causal frozen anonymization driver and its `src/`
package, so this experiment directory can be copied to another machine without
the parent `text-anonymization` checkout.

Source of truth (on the authoring machine):
`text-anonymization/baseline/llm-anonymization-v2/`

Do not edit here unless you intend to diverge; prefer syncing from upstream.
